title: Release Package Script Settings
description: maksit-webui: npm workspace publish to npmjs. ReleasePublishGuard (before NpmPublish/GitHub) controls allowed branches and tag rules. Set NPMJS_MAKS_IT env var to the npm automation token (same pattern as NUGET_MAKS_IT).

plugins.NpmReleaseVersion: Reads version from src/package.json (workspace root). syncWorkspaceVersions aligns packages/*/package.json before build/publish.
plugins.NpmBuild: Runs npm ci + npm run build in workspaceRoot.
plugins.ReleasePublishGuard: Place before NpmPublish/GitHub. tagVersionMustMatchReleaseVersion compares git tag on HEAD to NpmReleaseVersion.
plugins.NpmPublish: npmApiKey is the environment variable name holding the npm automation token (NPMJS_MAKS_IT). publishOrder must follow dependency order.
